```python
def shortest_palindrome():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return
    
    reversed_S = S[::-1]
    extended = S + '#' + reversed_S
    lps = [0] * len(extended)
    
    for i in range(1, len(extended)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and extended[i] != extended[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if extended[i] == extended[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    lps_length = lps[-1]
    result = S + reversed_S[:len(S) - lps_length]
    print(result)

shortest_palindrome()
```
